lines.speaker: Ranger Nita
lines.text: Welcome to the Sonoran trail, Zuzu. The desert looks still until you slow down.

lines.speaker: Ranger Nita
lines.text: Pick three plants and notice their little tricks: shade, spines, wax, flowers.

lines.speaker: Ranger Nita
lines.text: In your journal, write what you saw before what you think. That keeps us honest.

lines.speaker: Ranger Nita
lines.text: Tracks are a sentence in dust. Toes, size, direction. Read gently.

lines.speaker: Ranger Nita
lines.text: Good tracking leaves the animal alone. We learn from signs, then give the place back.

dialogue_tree.text: Welcome to the Sonoran trail, Zuzu. The desert looks still until you slow down.
Pick three plants and notice their little tricks: shade, spines, wax, flowers.
In your journal, write what you saw before what you think. That keeps us honest.
Tracks are a sentence in dust. Toes, size, direction. Read gently.
Good tracking leaves the animal alone. We learn from signs, then give the place back.
